company_desc_ko: JINN Co., Ltd. specializes in the development and supply of single-axis and multi-axis vibration testing systems equipped with Korea's only electro-magnetic actuator technology. The company also provides customized vibration durability testing systems tailored to customers' specific requirements. In addition to manufacturing advanced testing equipment, JINN offers comprehensive vibration durability and combined environmental testing services to ensure product reliability across a wide range of industries.
description_ko: Electro-magnetic actuators can be used in series, parallel, vertical, and horizontal test configurations and combinations, and can be reconstructed into new equipment for different purposes after use. Developed with 100% domestic technology, introduction and maintenance costs are reasonable compared to foreign products, enabling rapid customer response. It has overcome the disadvantages of hydraulic oil and noise, which are the disadvantages of perforated hydraulic equipment, and can be tested in the high-frequency area (~350Hz) and is only driven by electricity, making it simple to install and convenient to operate.

company_desc_ko:
Mirae C&E specializes in electronic components and EV charging components, providing high-quality products and reliable supply services to customers worldwide.

With extensive experience in electronic component distribution and a global supply network, the company supplies semiconductors, passive components, and EV charging parts while continuously expanding its business into EV charging solutions to support the growing clean energy industry. Guided by its philosophy of "Creating customer value by connecting technology and products," Mirae C&E is committed to delivering the most suitable products and services to meet customer needs.
description_ko:
The Mirae EV Portable Charger is designed for safe and reliable charging of electric vehicles equipped with a J1772 (Type 1) charging inlet. Built-in protection functions help ensure stable operation under various charging conditions.

Adjustable Charging Current

Users can easily select the charging current according to the available power source and charging environment.

Adjustable Current: 6A / 8A / 10A / 13A / 16A
Maximum Output Power: 3.5kW
Operating Voltage: 200~250VAC (Single Phase)
Intelligent LCD Display

The integrated LCD screen provides real-time charging information, including:

Charging Voltage
Charging Current
Charging Power
Energy Consumption (kWh)
Charging Time
Control Box Temperature
Grounding Status
Error Codes
Advanced Protection Functions

Multiple safety protections are built into the control box for enhanced user safety:

Leakage Current Protection
Over Voltage Protection
Under Voltage Protection
Over Current Protection
Over Temperature Protection
Ground Fault Detection
Surge Protection
Durable and Weather-Resistant Design

Designed for both indoor and outdoor use, the charger features a rugged construction suitable for demanding environments.

IP65 Waterproof & Dustproof Rating
Operating Temperature: -30°C to +50°C
Natural Air Cooling
1-meter Drop Resistance
Withstands Vehicle Load up to 2 Tons
Long Service Life

The charging connector is engineered for durability and reliability.

More than 10,000 Plug-in/Plug-out Cycles
Insulation Resistance: ≥100MΩ (DC 500V)
User-Friendly Operation

Simple one-button operation allows users to:

Adjust Charging Current
Set Charging Time
Configure Grounding Mode
Start Charging Quickly and Easily
LED Status Indication

Three-color LED indicators provide clear visual feedback on charger status:

Standby Mode
Plug Connected
Charging in Progress
Charging Complete
Fault and Protection Alerts
Compact and Portable

The compact control box design makes the charger convenient to carry and store.

Control Box Size: 210 × 85 × 50 mm
Lightweight Portable Design
Ideal for Home, Travel, and Emergency Charging

company_desc_ko:
Gridwiz is an energy platform company dedicated to building a sustainable future through energy data technology under its mission, "Heal the Earth – A World Where Everyone Enjoys Clean Energy."

The company integrates demand response (DR), energy storage systems (ESS), renewable energy, and EV charging infrastructure into a unified platform, enabling efficient management of energy generation, storage, and consumption. By connecting energy data across the entire ecosystem, Gridwiz provides innovative clean energy services that reduce energy costs, enhance grid stability, and accelerate carbon neutrality. The company is also leading next-generation energy initiatives, including RE100, Virtual Power Plants (VPP), Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X), and smart charging solutions.
description_ko: Gridwiz's EVCC is a communication modem for electric vehicle charging communication. It supports international standards such as DIN and ISO 15118.

description_ko:
The 30/40kW DC Fast Charger offers the ideal balance between charging speed and operational efficiency, making it suitable for apartments, commercial facilities, workplaces, and public charging stations. Equipped with high-efficiency power conversion technology, the charger delivers stable and reliable charging performance. OCPP-based connectivity enables remote monitoring, management, and firmware updates, ensuring efficient operation and maintenance.

• 30kW / 40kW DC charging output
• CCS1 connector support
• OCPP-based charging network integration
• Remote monitoring and FOTA support
• Comprehensive safety protection features
• Optimized for public and private EV charging infrastructure

company_desc_ko:
Gridwiz is an energy platform company dedicated to building a sustainable future through energy data technology under its mission, "Heal the Earth – A World Where Everyone Enjoys Clean Energy."

The company integrates demand response (DR), energy storage systems (ESS), renewable energy, and EV charging infrastructure into a unified platform, enabling efficient management of energy generation, storage, and consumption. description_ko:
The GESEBA07BT1S04 is a smart AC EV charger designed for enhanced safety, security, and future-ready energy services. Equipped with a Secure Element (SE) chipset-based SECC, it provides advanced cybersecurity protection. Its dual-relay architecture ensures reliable operation under high temperatures and continuous power loads.

The charger also features a bi-directional energy meter, enabling V2X (Vehicle-to-Everything) applications that allow electric vehicles to be utilized as energy resources. Leveraging PLC modem technology with over 170,000 units deployed worldwide, it supports Plug & Charge (PnC) and K-VAS services. In addition, the charger can be integrated with EVDR (EV Demand Response) solutions for intelligent energy management based on real-time grid conditions.

description_ko: GRIDWIZ CCS TESTER is an advanced EV Simulator designed to facilitate communication between EV Chargers and Electric Vehicles (EVs) in accordance with the DIN SPEC 70121 and ISO 15118 standards.

company_desc_ko:
Aeonus is a clean energy company committed to achieving carbon neutrality by introducing a new paradigm of mobile energy that delivers power wherever and whenever it is needed.

Centered around its mobile Energy Storage System (ESS) brand, indego, the company provides clean, silent, and emission-free alternatives to conventional diesel generators. Its solutions support reliable power supply across factories, event venues, urban areas, and disaster sites, contributing to Net-Zero initiatives. Guided by the vision of "Independent Energy, Infinite Possibilities," Aeonus is leading the future of energy mobility through modular and mobile energy platforms and customized energy solutions.
description_ko:
• Korea's First Innovation: The nation's first mobile-exclusive battery pack dedicated to ESS applications
• Premium Quality: Equipped with high-performance, EV-grade automotive cells for maximum reliability
• Robust Engineering: Features a high-reliability BMS and a structurally robust design
• Multi-Circuit Monitoring: Enables real-time monitoring of up to 60 DC line circuits
• Advanced Diagnostics: Supports event logging and precise fault identification (up to 128 events)
• Ultra-Fine Detection: High-precision leakage current detection with over 1mA accuracy
• Applications: Mobile ESS, emergency backup power, and versatile off-grid energy solutions
category: E-Mobility, Charge Equipment, Battery · ECU · EV Motor, R&D · Testing

description_ko:
• Stackable Modular ESS: Enables scalable deployment to meet variable capacity needs
• High Mobility: Engineered for easy transport and swift relocation
• Continuous Power Supply: Provides long-term, stable, and silent backup power
• Clean Energy Architecture: Tailored for efficient clean energy storage and smart distribution
• Applications: EV charging station backup, hospitals, commercial facilities, and remote areas

description_ko:
• Mobile ESS Solution: Provides reliable, off-grid clean power
• Eco-Friendly Alternative: Replaces conventional diesel generators for construction and outdoor sites
• Advanced Control: Features a digital automatic voltage regulator (AVR) with a DSP-based algorithm
• Smart Monitoring: Enhanced metering accuracy and an integrated OLTC tap counter function
• High Efficiency: Supports self-diagnosis and rapid deployment capabilities
• Applications: Construction sites, emergency backup power, and outdoor events

company_desc_ko: BD ENC develops innovative technologies for electric vehicle occupant protection, including next-generation EV platforms and battery thermal runaway prevention systems. By transforming practical ideas into commercialized technologies, the company focuses on enhancing vehicle safety and addressing critical challenges in the rapidly evolving electric mobility industry.
description_ko:
Currently, electric vehicles have the advantage of a low center of gravity to prevent rollovers, as the battery is located at the bottom of the vehicle.

However, since the battery is positioned directly beneath the occupants, there are frequent cases where flames shoot upward and engulf the passengers inside the vehicle, leaving them with no time to escape, resulting in their deaths in the event of an accidental collision with road structures, overcharging, or electrolyte vaporization.

This system is a patented technology designed to prevent this, and normally it is positioned at the front or rear of the vehicle. When an accident occurs while driving, it raises the battery upward, uses the hood and trunk as a shield between the battery and the passengers, disperses the direct impact of the accident on the battery, and also has the advantage of suppressing secondary fires by preventing the flames from spreading to the vehicle's interior materials by raising it upward even if a fire occurs.

In addition, by installing divided battery modules, individual battery modules can be moved to a separate safe place before a fire occurs or progresses, making fire suppression easier.
category: Battery · ECU · EV Motor, Related Items

company_desc_ko: BD ENC develops innovative technologies for electric vehicle occupant protection, including next-generation EV platforms and battery thermal runaway prevention systems. By transforming practical ideas into commercialized technologies, the company focuses on enhancing vehicle safety and addressing critical challenges in the rapidly evolving electric mobility industry.
description_ko:
Most battery fires, which are the biggest problem with electric vehicles, occur when the electrodes, which should be in uniform contact, react locally due to the vaporization of the liquid electrolyte and internal gases, generating heat. This heat further accelerates the vaporization of the liquid electrolyte, leading to a fire.

This patented technology is characterized by placing the termination- reaction-inducing liquid inside a battery cell to prevent further chemical reactions, and when abnormal heat generation occurs inside the battery, applying heat to the structure containing the termination-reaction-inducing liquid and the liquid to create holes, through which the liquid penetrates directly to the source of the internal heat generation using gravity and capillary action to stop the internal chemical reaction.

company_desc_ko: Nmotion has been providing eco-friendly and intelligent integrated mobility solutions for more than a decade, with expertise in vehicle control technologies and smart mobility systems. Through its flagship EVOA service and continuous innovation, the company delivers advanced mobility solutions that improve vehicle performance, connectivity, and operational efficiency.
description_ko:
What if EV battery data could be seen, understood, and used?

EVOA, presented at this exhibition, is an EV Mobility Data Platform that begins with electric vehicle battery diagnostics and expands into vehicle data collection and analysis.

Through EVOA Scanner and EVOA CARE, users can quickly and intuitively check key EV data such as battery condition, cell voltage deviation, high-voltage battery temperature, diagnostic trouble codes, charging history, and driving records.

EVOA visualizes hidden data inside electric vehicles, helping users better understand vehicle condition and enabling data-driven vehicle management and analysis.

Based on EV diagnostic technology, Nmotion is expanding into various mobility data technologies, including OBD, CAN, GPS, and IMU-based real vehicle data acquisition, vehicle behavior data analysis, monitoring, API integration, and AI-based data analysis.

From EV battery diagnostics to vehicle data collection, analysis, and utilization, EVOA offers a new way to experience EV data.

company_desc_ko:
Established in 1986, Costel is a manufacturing company that has specialized in EV charging solutions since 2014. The company provides total solutions covering the design, manufacturing, installation, and maintenance of EV chargers.

Costel develops and manufactures AC, DC, and ultra-fast chargers entirely in-house, ensuring stable supply chains and consistent product quality through its own production facilities. Backed by proven manufacturing expertise and comprehensive after-sales services, Costel is committed to becoming a trusted partner in expanding sustainable EV charging infrastructure.
description_ko: Smart Control EV charger Slow 7kW

company_desc_ko:
BASMAN Technology develops innovative energy solutions in renewable energy, rechargeable batteries, and building energy-saving systems.

The company manufactures building automation products as a development partner for major corporations and has successfully commercialized patented 1.5V lithium-ion rechargeable batteries. It has also developed integrated and external On-Board Chargers (OBC) for personal mobility charging infrastructure. Leveraging extensive expertise in Battery Management Systems (BMS) and energy storage technologies, BASMAN Technology is expanding into data-driven energy services, including location analytics based on BMS data.
description_ko:
B-Mobility: A New Freedom of Charging! A New Freedom of Mobility!

B-Mobility is a fast, safe, and next-generation electric smart mobility solution.
It was developed with the goal of creating a new mode of transportation that anyone can ride easily
and safely for deliveries, grocery shopping, and short-distance travel.

The 'B' in B-Mobility stands for
* Bee: Symbolizing agility, diligence, and eco-friendliness, it represents a vehicle that moves quickly and smartly like a honeybee despite its compact size.
* Beyond: Embodying innovation and technology that go beyond conventional E-mobility.

It is a Bee-Mobility that protects pedestrian safety with its fast charging, powerful driving, and a signature "whirring" bee-like sound while operating.
At the same time, it is a new-concept Beyond-Mobility that integrates charging speed, safety, versatility, and practicality—this is B-Mobility.

Small yet powerfully strong, the Basman Bee 420 brings a new level of freedom to your daily life.
category: E-Mobility, Battery · ECU · EV Motor, R&D · Testing

company_desc_ko:
Kitronics specializes in pressure distribution measurement solutions based on electronic pressure-sensitive film for industrial quality inspection automation.

The company provides customized quality automation consulting and measurement solutions trusted by leading domestic and global manufacturers. With customer-focused technical support and rapid response services, Kitronics helps manufacturers improve quality control, production efficiency, and inspection accuracy.
description_ko:
PressureScan II is a pressure mapping system for real-time pressure distribution measurement and analysis. It enables digital pressure data collection and supports faster, more consistent inspection workflows compared with conventional film-based checks. Kitronyx combines ultra-thin film sensors, high-speed hardware, analysis software, and sensor calibration technologies to help manufacturers improve quality inspection and process control in pressure-sensitive production processes.
This technology can be applied to pressure-sensitive manufacturing processes in display, battery, semiconductor, and other industries. By converting pressure measurement results into analyzable digital data, it can support process-condition optimization, defect investigation, and automated quality inspection in smart-factory environments.

company_desc_ko:
Headlinecom is a manufacturing company specializing in custom metal fabrication for commercial and industrial applications.

Rather than simply producing products, the company focuses on understanding customers' objectives and project environments to recommend the most suitable manufacturing solutions. Leveraging extensive production expertise, Headlinecom serves a wide range of industries, including exhibitions, pop-up stores, retail spaces, industrial structures, and EV charging infrastructure, as a trusted fabrication partner.
description_ko:
HEADLINECOM’s EV Charger Canopy is a customized metal structure designed to protect EV chargers from external environmental conditions while improving the safety and overall quality of EV charging spaces.

It can be designed and manufactured to suit various installation environments, including parking lots, public institutions, commercial facilities, gas stations, apartment complexes, and logistics centers. Depending on the charger specifications and site conditions, the size, structure, color, lighting, and signage can be customized.

The main structure is built with a durable metal frame, and finishing options such as powder coating, galvanizing, and stainless steel can be applied according to the installation environment. LED lighting, EV charging zone signage, and protection from rain, snow, and direct sunlight can also be added to improve user convenience and visibility.

HEADLINECOM has in-house manufacturing capabilities covering metal cutting, bending, welding, coating, assembly, and installation. This allows us to provide not only EV charger canopies but also various metal structures required for EV charging stations.

In line with the expansion of EV charging infrastructure, HEADLINECOM provides reliable EV charger canopy solutions for safe, durable, and well-organized charging environments.

company_desc_ko:
Standard Energy Inc. is a battery technology company specializing in the development of next-generation Vanadium Ion Battery (VIB) technology for Energy Storage Systems (ESS).

Leveraging its proprietary battery technology that addresses the limitations of conventional lithium-ion batteries, the company provides outstanding safety, long service life, and reliable performance. Its energy storage solutions are widely applied across various sectors, including renewable energy, data centers, industrial ESS, and EV charging infrastructure.

Through continuous research and innovation, Standard Energy Inc. is committed to advancing safe and sustainable energy storage technologies while serving as a trusted partner in the global energy industry.
product_ko: Vanadium Ion Battery Energy Storage System
description_ko:
Standard Energy's Vanadium Ion Battery (VIB) ESS is the world's first energy storage system built on proprietary VIB technology. Combining vanadium-based energy storage with a completely non-flammable aqueous electrolyte, it offers unmatched safety, exceptional durability, and high-power performance.
Delivering over 97% energy efficiency and verified through 50,000+ charge-discharge cycles, Proven through over 50,000 charge-discharge cycles, the battery offers exceptional durability and a long service life for sustained long-term operation. Its innovative design enables high-power, long-duration energy delivery while maximizing space efficiency and energy density through simplified internal architecture.
Recognized by industry standards and incorporated into the Korean Electrical Code (KEC), Standard Energy's VIB ESS has already been deployed and is operating across a wide range of customer sites.

company_desc_ko: EVNSOL Co., Ltd. is a technology company specializing in smart energy and EV charging solutions. The company develops innovative technologies that enhance the efficiency, reliability, and safety of electric vehicle charging infrastructure, contributing to the advancement of sustainable mobility and clean energy ecosystems.
description_ko:
As the adoption of electric vehicles continues to accelerate, ultra-fast charging systems rated at 350 kW and above are rapidly becoming the industry standard. Under these high-power charging conditions, the heat generated within the charging cable has a direct impact on charging performance, operational safety, and equipment reliability.

Our EV Ultra-Fast Charging Cable Cooling System is an advanced thermal management solution that receives real-time temperature data from the charging cable through the ultra-fast charger. Based on this information, it precisely controls heat to maintain the cable temperature within an optimal operating range and prevents excessive temperature rise, ensuring safe and stable high-power charging.

By incorporating proprietary cooling technology and an optimized coolant flow-path design, the system efficiently maintains the cable temperature while significantly improving charging performance. It enables the use of practical cable diameters while safely carrying high current, allowing the charger to maintain its rated output and achieve ultra-fast charging within 15 to 30 minutes. Furthermore, its outstanding thermal management capability ensures stable long-term high-power operation, enhancing product durability and extending service life.

The cable cooling system is not merely an auxiliary component—it is a core enabling technology for ultra-high-power and ultra-high-current charging environments. It ensures safety, durability, user convenience, and consistent charging performance. The system can be integrated into fast chargers for a wide range of electric mobility applications, including passenger EVs, electric trucks, electric buses, heavy-duty construction equipment, electric vessels, and Urban Air Mobility (UAM). In addition, its advanced cooling technology can be applied to various thermal management applications requiring efficient heat dissipation, such as Power Banks and Energy Storage Systems (ESS).
category: Charge Equipment, Battery · ECU · EV Motor

company_desc_ko:
JND Electronics is a technology-driven company specializing in power metering, power quality measurement, and smart metering solutions.

The company designs integrated measurement systems combining current transformers (CTs) and power meters to deliver high accuracy, reliability, and ease of use in real-world applications. Supported by proprietary CT design technology, high-efficiency power solutions, advanced power quality analysis capabilities, and multiple patents and certifications, JND Electronics provides trusted solutions for energy management and power monitoring.
description_ko:
IDCS-PS Series is a DC current sensor that applies zero-drift OP AMP technology to eliminate DC offset and enables precise current measurement from DC to AC.

Its split-core structure allows installation without disconnecting existing bus bars, while RJ12/RJ45 connector options make wiring and system integration simple.

With DIN rail and panel mounting support, it can be reliably applied in various environments such as control panels, power distribution units, industrial equipment, solar installations, and telecom infrastructure.
category: Charge Equipment, Related Items, R&D · Testing

company_desc_ko:
JND Electronics is a technology-driven company specializing in power metering, power quality measurement, and smart metering solutions.

The company designs integrated measurement systems combining current transformers (CTs) and power meters to deliver high accuracy, reliability, and ease of use in real-world applications. Supported by proprietary CT design technology, high-efficiency power solutions, advanced power quality analysis capabilities, and multiple patents and certifications, JND Electronics provides trusted solutions for energy management and power monitoring.
description_ko:
The Sensway-DCS Series is a commercial DC billing meter designed to precisely measure DC voltage and current in PV1500V lines.
With advanced digital isolation technology, it minimizes energy loss and supports accurate energy billing.
It is an optimized DC metering solution for EV charging stations, energy storage systems (ESS), and LVDC distribution systems.

company_desc_ko:
TM KOREA specializes in the import and distribution of automotive components, providing competitive products and solutions to domestic automotive manufacturers and related industries.

Leveraging a global supply network and extensive industry expertise, the company ensures a stable supply of high-quality automotive parts while contributing to the growth and competitiveness of the automotive industry.
description_ko:
Our products include commercial vehicle instrument clusters (including related components) and Digital Mirror Systems (CMS).

These products are designed to comply with European, U.S., and Chinese standards, providing flexible solutions that can be tailored to meet various customer and vehicle design requirements.

As Korean commercial vehicles increasingly adopt advanced electronic systems, including electric vehicles (EVs) and hydrogen fuel cell vehicles (FCEVs), we believe our products offer an ideal solution with outstanding performance, reliability, and regulatory compliance.

company_desc_ko:
Established in 2004, Jijun System is a comprehensive smart city solution provider offering Intelligent Building Systems (IBS), AI-powered smart parking systems, ceiling-mounted EV chargers, healthcare systems, and LED lighting solutions.

Its flagship product, SKYCHARGING, is an innovative ceiling-mounted EV charger featuring a one-touch semi-automatic lifting cable system that addresses the safety, installation, scalability, and usability limitations of conventional wall-mounted and stand-type chargers. Equipped with PLC (Power Line Communication)-based fire prevention and real-time battery monitoring technologies, the system can manage up to 12 chargers through a single kiosk, making it ideal for large-scale parking facilities. In addition, the company's AI-based smart parking system has been officially designated as an Innovative Product by the Korean government and is the first in Korea to commercialize Bluetooth Mesh communication technology for underground parking lots, integrating parking guidance, security, energy management, emergency call systems, and seamless access control into a unified platform.
description_ko:
SKYCHARGING
Ceiling-Type EV Charger — "Technology Above the Ceiling, SKYCHARGING"
SKYCHARGING is a next-generation EV charging system that mounts the charger, conduits, and wiring entirely on the parking-garage ceiling using a lifting-cable mechanism. By eliminating the need for floor or wall space, it maximizes parking efficiency while fundamentally overcoming the safety, scalability, and aesthetic limitations of conventional wall-mounted and standalone chargers.

Reclaim Your Space with Integrated Ceiling Installation
A single integrated installation duct (mold bar) allows the charger — along with CCTV, occupancy indicators, parking-guidance lighting, and PA speakers — to be expanded freely without additional electrical work. Ceiling installation improves both electrical safety and the visual appearance of the parking area, while enabling double-sided parking use and flexible EV zone layouts.

A Charging Experience at Your Fingertips
A one-touch, semi-automatic retractable connector lets users lower and raise the cable with ease, while a dedicated smartphone app handles charging, monitoring, and payment all in one place. A single kiosk can link, authenticate, and process payment for up to 12 chargers, making it ideal for large-scale parking facilities.

Safe, Always
Built-in PLC (Power Line Communication) technology monitors battery voltage, current, and temperature in real time, automatically stops charging when abnormalities are detected, and prevents overcharging. An intuitive LED display shows Standby, Charging, Complete, and Fault status at a glance — delivering a safe charging environment that helps prevent EV fires before they start.

SKYCHARGING is more than a charger. It sets a new standard for safer, smarter mobility infrastructure.

company_desc_ko:
Cobon specializes in the development and manufacturing of Residual Current Monitoring (RCM) modules and current sensors for EV charging systems.

Leveraging proprietary Fluxgate-based sensing technology and advanced engineering expertise, the company delivers highly reliable solutions that comply with international safety standards, including IEC and UL. Cobon serves a wide range of power and energy applications, such as EV chargers and photovoltaic systems, with high-performance safety solutions.

Through continuous innovation and customer-oriented development, Cobon is committed to providing safer and more reliable electrical protection solutions while becoming a trusted global partner in the power and energy industry.
description_ko:
compliant with IEC 62955, IEC 62752, and UL 2231-2 standards
6 mA DC Residual Current Detection
Fluxgate based current sensor
Composed of AEC-Q qualified components
Open-collector output
Application : EV Chargers(Wallbox, IC-CPD)
Integrated with a nanocrystalline core
PCB Horizontal mounting
Customized solution

company_desc_ko:
Cobon specializes in the development and manufacturing of Residual Current Monitoring (RCM) modules and current sensors for EV charging systems.

Leveraging proprietary Fluxgate-based sensing technology and advanced engineering expertise, the company delivers highly reliable solutions that comply with international safety standards, including IEC and UL. Cobon serves a wide range of power and energy applications, such as EV chargers and photovoltaic systems, with high-performance safety solutions.

Through continuous innovation and customer-oriented development, Cobon is committed to providing safer and more reliable electrical protection solutions while becoming a trusted global partner in the power and energy industry.
description_ko:
compliant with IEC 62955, IEC 62752, and UL 2231-2 standards
6 mA DC Residual Current Detection
Fluxgate based current sensor
Composed of AEC-Q qualified components
Open-collector output
Application : EV Chargers(Wallbox, IC-CPD)
Integrated with a nanocrystalline core
PCB vertical mounting
Customized solution

company_desc_ko:
HAN System Co., Ltd. is a specialized IT company focused on testing, certification, and standards information systems. Since 2000, the company has developed and operated more than 200 national public platforms, including the e-Nara Standards & Certification Platform, e-KOLAS System, Safety Korea Portal, Integrated Accreditation Information System, and the Government-wide Integrated Certification System.

Building on its extensive expertise in the testing and certification domain, HAN System has developed Q-LIMS, an integrated laboratory information management system that supports the digital transformation of testing and certification processes. Designed in accordance with KS Q ISO/IEC 17025 requirements, Q-LIMS streamlines the entire laboratory workflow—from sample registration and test management to report issuance and KOLAS accreditation support—helping laboratories improve efficiency, ensure compliance, and focus on delivering reliable testing services.
description_ko:
Q-LIMS is an integrated management system that connects the entire workflow of testing and certification laboratories. It unifies request intake, sample management, testing, scheduling, and report issuance into a single flow—so information entered once automatically populates quotes and test reports. When measured values are entered, measurement uncertainty is calculated automatically, reports are issued in the laboratory's own format, and approval and official seals are handled within the system.

Q-LIMS also implements the management areas required by KS Q ISO/IEC 17025—personnel competence, equipment calibration, nonconformity handling, internal audits, and document control—so everyday work naturally becomes standard-compliant records. By letting the system handle quality operations that once relied on memory and manual paperwork, laboratories can focus on testing rather than documentation and stay continuously ready for assessment.

company_desc_ko:
HCT Co., Ltd. is a globally accredited Testing, Inspection, Certification, and Calibration (TIC) company listed on the KOSDAQ since 2016. The company provides comprehensive testing, inspection, certification, and calibration services across a wide range of advanced industries.

Its expertise covers telecommunications, RF testing, EMC, SAR, OTA, electrical safety, batteries, mobility, defense, aerospace, nuclear power, medical devices, and cybersecurity. Supported by overseas operations in the United States and Indonesia, along with a global certification network covering more than 200 countries, HCT helps customers strengthen product competitiveness and successfully access international markets as a trusted technical partner.
description_ko: The DASY6-based SAR Measurement System is a robot-based EM near-field scanning system used to precisely evaluate the specific absorption rate (SAR) of wireless transmitting devices. It supports SAR compliance evaluation in line with IEEE 1528 and IEC 62209-1/2/3 and improves measurement efficiency through automated robot scanning and dedicated software. In addition to SAR testing, the system can be applied to RF evaluation fields such as HAC, antenna, 5G, EMI, and EMC, supporting product safety verification and certification for wireless communication devices.

company_desc_ko:
HCT Co., Ltd. is a globally accredited Testing, Inspection, Certification, and Calibration (TIC) company listed on the KOSDAQ since 2016. The company provides comprehensive testing, inspection, certification, and calibration services across a wide range of advanced industries.

Its expertise covers telecommunications, RF testing, EMC, SAR, OTA, electrical safety, batteries, mobility, defense, aerospace, nuclear power, medical devices, and cybersecurity. Supported by overseas operations in the United States and Indonesia, along with a global certification network covering more than 200 countries, HCT helps customers strengthen product competitiveness and successfully access international markets as a trusted technical partner.
description_ko: Customized RF Switch Matrix is a tailored RF signal routing solution designed for test and certification, R&D, production line automation, and defense-related RF operation environments. The system can be configured according to customer requirements, including switch structure, filters, amplifiers, port configuration, frequency band, control interface, and case design. Integrated with ATP software, it supports RF path switching, repeatable operation, instrument control, result management, and report workflow in one streamlined process.

company_desc_ko:
HCT Co., Ltd. is a globally accredited Testing, Inspection, Certification, and Calibration (TIC) company listed on the KOSDAQ since 2016. The company provides comprehensive testing, inspection, certification, and calibration services across a wide range of advanced industries.

Supported by overseas operations in the United States and Indonesia, along with a global certification network covering more than 200 countries, HCT helps customers strengthen product competitiveness and successfully access international markets as a trusted technical partner.
description_ko: An automated illumination monitoring system for EMC immunity test environments. It observes light from automotive lighting through optical fiber and a Flux Monitor, converts it into electrical signals, and quantitatively monitors illumination changes. The system supports objective malfunction detection and can be integrated with existing EMC immunity test systems via GPIB communication.

With stable sourcing capabilities and comprehensive technical support, TOYOMURA ELECTRONICS KOREA is committed to delivering reliable products and customized solutions that meet the evolving needs of the automotive industry while contributing to the advancement of future mobility.

company_desc_ko:
AutoL is a company specializing in the development and manufacturing of LiDAR sensors. Unlike radar, which uses radio waves, LiDAR uses light to detect objects and measure distances, delivering higher resolution and superior performance in low-light and nighttime environments.
By applying its proprietary high-sensitivity technology, AutoL has significantly reduced the size and cost of LiDAR while optimizing it for reliable operation in harsh outdoor environments. The technology has demonstrated broad applicability across autonomous vehicles, robotics, smart city infrastructure, and security systems.
description_ko: The G192 is a premium long-range LiDAR with 192 channels, capable of ultra-long-range detection up to 300 meters. It provides a 120° horizontal and 25° vertical field of view. Designed for high-performance autonomous driving, it ensures stable operation in extreme conditions, making it ideal for vehicles and advanced infrastructure systems requiring precise environmental perception.
category: Autonomous Driving Core Technologies, Unmanned & Robotics Solutions, Mobility Services & Infrastructure

company_desc_ko:
AutoL is a company specializing in the development and manufacturing of LiDAR sensors. Unlike radar, which uses radio waves, LiDAR uses light to detect objects and measure distances, delivering higher resolution and superior performance in low-light and nighttime environments.
By applying its proprietary high-sensitivity technology, AutoL has significantly reduced the size and cost of LiDAR while optimizing it for reliable operation in harsh outdoor environments. The technology has demonstrated broad applicability across autonomous vehicles, robotics, smart city infrastructure, and security systems.
description_ko: The G32 is a fixed LiDAR sensor with 32 channels, offering a detection range of up to 250 meters, a horizontal field of view (HFOV) of 120°, and a vertical field of view (VFOV) of 10°. Designed with automotive-grade durability and reliability, it operates stably even in harsh environments and is optimized for long-range forward detection. These features make it ideal for applications such as smart city infrastructure, video security, and autonomous driving.

company_desc_ko:
WAYS1 Inc develops digital twin-based real-time traffic infrastructure solutions for smart cities and autonomous driving.
Leveraging its Local Dynamic Map (LDM) technology, the company enables cooperative autonomous driving environments and provides Cooperative Intelligent Transport Systems (C-ITS) and high-definition digital maps designed for the global market.
description_ko: LDM2X maps dynamic information collected from roadside equipment and traffic signal controllers onto HD map. By converting and broadcasting this data into V2X standard messages for autonomous vehicles, it complements the vehicles perception limits in real time.
category: Autonomous Driving Core Technologies, Mobility Services & Infrastructure

company_desc_ko:
WAYS1 Inc develops digital twin-based real-time traffic infrastructure solutions for smart cities and autonomous driving.
Leveraging its Local Dynamic Map (LDM) technology, the company enables cooperative autonomous driving environments and provides Cooperative Intelligent Transport Systems (C-ITS) and high-definition digital maps designed for the global market.
description_ko: LDM TWIN is a real-time traffic operations and management platform built on HD Map infrastructure. It accurately recreates road environments as a digital twin, enabling integrated monitoring and operation of autonomous driving infrastructure through real-time tracking of moving objects and customizable multi-perspective analysis views.

company_desc_ko:
WAYS1 Inc develops digital twin-based real-time traffic infrastructure solutions for smart cities and autonomous driving.
Leveraging its Local Dynamic Map (LDM) technology, the company enables cooperative autonomous driving environments and provides Cooperative Intelligent Transport Systems (C-ITS) and high-definition digital maps designed for the global market.
description_ko: AVION is a smart interface platform for autonomous driving that connects vehicles, drivers, and road infrastructure. It intuitively communicates driving conditions and potential hazards through HD Map-based real-time visualization, facilitating seamless interaction between drivers and autonomous driving systems.

company_desc_ko:
Intellectus provides middleware and edge computing solutions that support real-time data collection, integration, processing, and communication.

Its flagship solution, int2ConneX (DDS Middleware), enables intelligent operations and facilitates the development of efficient data ecosystems by ensuring seamless and reliable data exchange.
description_ko: We provide middleware and edge computing solutions that support real-time data collection, integration, processing, and communication. Through our core service, 'int2ConneX (DDS Middleware)', we support intelligent operations and the establishment of a data ecosystem.
category: Software & AI Solutions, Mobility Services & Infrastructure

company_desc_ko:
RVS Lab is a radar software company that redefines the boundaries of sensing technology by combining radar engineering with advanced software innovation.

Although radar offers exceptional environmental robustness and cost efficiency, its full potential has long been constrained by technical performance limitations. RVS Lab overcomes these challenges through its proprietary radar signal processing algorithms, unlocking new levels of sensing performance across diverse applications.
description_ko: RadarSoft® PNTA is a radar signal processing software that generates high-precision object trajectories by probabilistically analyzing sequential radar frames. It enhances radar resolution and perception performance without requiring additional hardware, supporting noise and multipath suppression, close-object separation, long-range target perception, and SLAM applications. The technology is applicable to automotive, robotics, drone, and air mobility platforms.

company_desc_ko:
SOS LAB Co., Ltd is a leading Korean LiDAR company specializing in the development and mass production of high-performance 3D LiDAR sensors optimized for autonomous driving, smart cities, and robotics.

Its compact solid-state LiDAR technology delivers both high precision and exceptional durability, ensuring reliable performance across diverse environments while driving innovation in future mobility through global partnerships.
description_ko:
- Solid-state design with no moving parts (camera-like), delivering automotive-grade durability
- Up to 150m detection range with FOV up to 120° x 35°, optimized for forward and side obstacle detection in autonomous vehicles
- IP69K rated and operable from -40°C to 85°C, built for demanding automotive environments
category: Autonomous Driving Core Technologies, Software & AI Solutions, Mobility Services & Infrastructure

company_desc_ko:

Its compact solid-state LiDAR technology delivers both high precision and exceptional durability, ensuring reliable performance across diverse environments while driving innovation in future mobility through global partnerships.
description_ko:

- High-speed integration with LCU via MIPI or FPD-Link III interface, optimized for in-vehicle computing platforms
- Compact and lightweight (under 335.8g), enabling installation in space-constrained areas like bumpers and side mirrors

company_desc_ko:

Its compact solid-state LiDAR technology delivers both high precision and exceptional durability, ensuring reliable performance across diverse environments while driving innovation in future mobility through global partnerships.

company_desc_ko:

Its compact solid-state LiDAR technology delivers both high precision and exceptional durability, ensuring reliable performance across diverse environments while driving innovation in future mobility through global partnerships.
description_ko:

- Compact form factor designed for LCU integration, enabling flexible mounting on front grille, fenders, and other vehicle positions

company_desc_ko:
SOS LAB Co., Ltd is a leading Korean LiDAR company specializing in the development and mass production of high-performance 3D LiDAR sensors optimized for autonomous driving, smart cities, and robotics.

Its compact solid-state LiDAR technology delivers both high precision and exceptional durability, ensuring reliable performance across diverse environments while driving innovation in future mobility through global partnerships.
description_ko:

- Dual operating modes (Fine Mode / Range Mode) provide flexibility between precision and detection range

company_desc_ko: Yellowknife is a deep-tech startup spun off from Hyundai Motor Group, specializing in vehicle-optimized 3D digital twin technology. Its proprietary Rapion engine enables ultra-low latency, lightweight high-quality rendering, and seamless integration across various automotive platforms, making it ideal for digital cockpit, infotainment, and vehicle visualization applications. With proven experience working with leading automotive OEMs and Tier-1 suppliers, Yellowknife provides innovative visualization solutions that accelerate the development of next-generation mobility systems.
product_ko: Vehicle Data 3D Visualization Solution - CAN Viz
description_ko:
CAN Viz is a digital-twin-based 3D visualization and validation solution for vehicle software developers. It turns chassis-system dynamics—previously legible only as dense data and graphs—into intuitive real-time 3D, raising development and validation productivity.

• Real-time 3D motion visualization: Vehicle posture, driving behavior, and chassis signals are synchronized to a digital twin 3D model in real time, with switchable camera views for multi-angle analysis.
• Integrated logging & replay: Full or event-specific driving data is recorded and replayed as 3D visualization from historical data.
• Expert-grade data analysis: Key signals are monitored as real-time graphs alongside the 3D motion, with a multi-graph dashboard for in-depth analysis.
• Control-SW configuration: Communicating with the gateway device, control functions and chassis control modes can be toggled and set directly within the visualization environment.
• Tailored configuration: From HIL simulation to real-vehicle testing, features are configured to the customer's environment, target vehicle, and actuators.

company_desc_ko: Autonomous A2Z is one of Korea's leading autonomous driving technology companies, recognized globally for its advanced full-stack autonomous driving capabilities. The company develops autonomous driving platforms and operates commercial autonomous mobility services, including robo-shuttles and robo-taxis, across multiple cities in Korea and overseas. With over one million kilometers of autonomous driving experience, successful Level 4 autonomous vehicle deployments, and ongoing expansion into international markets such as Japan, Singapore, and the UAE, Autonomous A2Z is driving the commercialization of safe and reliable autonomous mobility solutions worldwide.
category: Autonomous Driving Core Technologies, Mobility Services & Infrastructure
